title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Google DeepMind tools including AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity are being used by Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The tools enabled analysis of 15,000 potential binding sites to identify 15 viable targets, deployable on modest compute infrastructure.
